name: Stellar Catalyst
desc: A Stellar Resonance Catalyst has been physically integrated into the vessel’s systems architecture. The installation anchors the artifact’s containment lattice directly into core shipboard infrastructure, completing a persistent linkage between conventional control systems and a possible external resonance framework. While the catalyst remains inert under normal conditions, its presence confirms that the vessel’s native structural design is fully engaged and aligned with stellar-scale activation protocols. The implications are not fully understood, but surviving Domain cautionary records consistently classify this system class as unsuitable for operation within populated systems.

name: Empty Catalyst
desc: The vessel’s architecture incorporates a purpose-built auxiliary systems framework integrated into its primary structural design. Its internal configuration consisting of adaptive containment channels and dormant interface pathways consistent with late-Domain experimental shipbuilding doctrine. The structure serves no functional purpose under normal operation, but is evidently intended to accommodate an unknown high-priority component requiring deep system-level coupling. All diagnostic attempts to determine its intended use return inconclusive results, offering no indication of its intended function.
